about.title: About
about.kicker: Backend depth, DevOps focus, cloud delivery.
paragraphs: I'm a software engineer with 17+ years of experience in backend development, specializing in building reliable APIs and scalable systems using Java and Spring-based technologies.

Over time, I've expanded into DevOps and Cloud Engineering, working hands-on with AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines. My focus is on automating infrastructure, improving deployment workflows, and building production-ready cloud platforms.
This portfolio is designed as a practical DevOps showcase, demonstrating how I apply Infrastructure as Code, secure CI/CD pipelines, and cloud-native architecture to deliver real-world systems.

contact.title: Contact
contact.message: Interested in DevOps, cloud infrastructure, or platform engineering work? Let us connect.
